name: C&A Modas S.A.
summary: C&A Modas S.A. operates a chain of retail fashion stores in Europe, Latin America, and Asia. The company's stores sell apparel, footwear, bags and accessories, mobile phones, watches, costume jewelry, cosmetics, and other products. It is also involved in the issuance of credit cards and personal loans; and intermediation in brokering and promoting the distribution of insurance, saving bonds, and related products offered by insurers and other third parties, as well as credit to finance purchases. The company operates 299 stores. It provides its products for female, male, and children, as well as sells online. The company was founded in 1841 and is based in Barueri, Brazil. C&A Modas S.A. operates as a subsidiary of COFRA Holding AG
